name: Smart Girl : Christmas
short_description: A game that increases memory to remember and enter numbers. And collect portraits of beautiful Christmas girls.
detailed_description:
Smart Girl: Christmas' is a game of looking for portraits of cute Christmas girls.
It is a game to improve memory. It is easy and simple, but it can also fail.

Replay method: Remember 6 to 11 numbers in a limited time and enter a memorable number.

key usage:

0-9, , Esc, Back Space

function:

  • Improve memory
  • Women of various styles
  • 12 Girl's photographs
  • Comfortable Christmas music

supported_languages:
English*, French, Italian, German, Spanish - Spain, Greek, Dutch, Norwegian, Danish, Russian, Romanian, Vietnamese, Bulgarian, Swedish, Spanish - Latin America, Arabic, Ukrainian, Japanese, Simplified Chinese, Traditional Chinese, Czech, Thai, Turkish, Portuguese - Portugal, Portuguese - Brazil, Polish, Finnish, Korean, Hungarian
*languages with full audio support
